commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Then I cut asunder my other staff, even Unity, that I might break the brotherhood between Judah and Israel. The latter remained obstinate, (Calmet) while Juda, the real "confessor "(Haydock) embraced the gospel. After the destruction of the temple, the Jewish ceremonies were no longer (Calmet) observed or tolerated in the Church, as they had been, in order that the synagogue might be buried with honour. Augustine) (Haydock) The Jews are rejected. (Worthington).
